arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal evolution needs jumpstarting. Only a victory against Real Madrid will do, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: At Arsenal, they are calling this their biggest game for 20 years. That says much about the work Mikel Arteta has done to drag Arsenal back to this level.

arts.ttl: How to Watch Arsenal vs. Real Madrid: Champions League Quarterfinals First Leg
arts.sum: Fans can watch Arsenal take on Real Madrid in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals on Paramount+ or Amazon Prime Video.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid: Carlo Ancelotti reveals plan with Vinicius Junior at risk of Champions League ban for Arsenal tie
arts.sum: A number of Real Madrid players are walking the disciplinary tight-rope

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends telling message to Arsenal stars ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter finals on Tuesday night and Gunners boss Mikel Arteta admitted it's the biggest game of his managerial career

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Arsenal vs Real Madrid 1st Leg Preview Live From Emirates
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, live from Emirates stadium after Real Madrid’s training session, shares three important points ahead of tomorrow’s game against Arsenal. It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star highlights one area in which Arsenal are ‘very dangerous’
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Thibaut Courtois has sent something of a warning the way of the rest of Carlo Ancelotti’s squad. This comes ahead of Los Blancos’ upcoming showdown with Arsenal.…

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Real Madrid: Gabriel, Tchouameni & Every Player Out of Champions League Quarterfinals First Leg
arts.sum: 12 players will miss out on the first leg of Arsenal and Real Madrid's Champions League quarterfinal tie through injury and suspension.

arts.ttl: ‘One of the best’ – Carlo Ancelotti on Arsenal star Martin Ødegaard’s Real Madrid exit
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Monday provided his take on the decision of Martin Ødegaard to depart the club for Arsenal. This of course comes as Real…

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Real Madrid: "One thing" about Los Blancos could help Gunners stun Champions League holders
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Ray Parlour explains "the one thing" about Real Madrid that should give the Gunners confidence of securing a first-leg win on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Courtois: Madrid wary of Arsenal set-piece threat
arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois admitted on Monday that Real Madrid have been working on coping with Champions League opponents Arsenal's set piece threat, but said it's "a matter of time" before Mikel Arteta's team win a trophy.
